description_long: A pile of multiple garbage bags is stacked together on a piece of cardboard and possibly some other discarded items. The bags are primarily black, with a few green ones mixed in, and they appear to be made of thin, shiny plastic. The bags are tightly packed and bulging, suggesting they are filled with various types of waste. Some bags are loosely tied at the top, while others are more tightly knotted, and a few have visible creases and folds. Among the bags, there are also some rigid objects, such as a plastic crate and possibly some cardboard boxes, partially visible beneath and between the bags. The overall appearance is that of a typical urban trash pile found on a sidewalk or near a building awaiting collection.
description: A tightly packed pile of black and green garbage bags, some bulging and tied, stacked on cardboard and mixed with a plastic crate.
description_view_0: Front view shows a mix of black and green garbage bags, with cardboard and a plastic crate partially visible at the base.
description_view_1: This side highlights the dominance of black bags, with green bags and cardboard more obscured, and the pile appears denser.
description_view_2: From this angle, the bags are more separated, and the crate is less visible, with the focus on the rounded, bulging shapes of the bags.
description_view_3: Rear view reveals the plastic crate and more structural details, with the bags arching over and partially concealing the crate.
attribute_fullness_or_bulging: bulging and overfilled, with taut surfaces and rounded shapes
attribute_placement_or_location: on the ground, stacked on cardboard and among other discarded items
